title: Define and Resolve Custom Properties
summary: Build and verify css custom property definition in field manual spacing and color value trace through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css custom property definition from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css custom property definition without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the field manual spacing and color value trace case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css custom property definition when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual spacing and color value trace.
steps.why: Define and Resolve Custom Properties makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in field manual spacing and color value trace.

content.text: A custom property name begins with two hyphens, is case-sensitive, participates in the cascade, and stores a token stream until var() is substituted into a real property. The consuming property still must accept the resolved value. Custom properties can reduce repeated decisions and expose component inputs, but a variable for every literal makes the stylesheet harder to reason about. Apply it to field manual spacing and color value trace.
